basics.label: Data/Software Engineer
basics.name: Alexander Matsievsky
basics.summary: I was introduced to computing by a passionate educator in high school, and never looked back. Two decades later, I am a seasoned software engineer who's acquired a wide range of skills while bringing people's ideas to life through code. My professional goal is to broaden my expertise with every groundbreaking technology I can get my hands on, without falling into amateurism or spreading too thin.
